title: Worksheet indent alignment property not working on Ubuntu OS
author: 247software-lokesh-patil
body:
When I am trying to indent the cell by some value(integer), the cell is not getting indent when viewed in Excel, but when I indent the same cell directly through Excel(downloaded) it's takes the indent value applied from our code and indent it.
Code: 
let row = worksheet.lastRow; // getting the last rendered row
row.getCell(1).alignment = { indent: 2 }; // indenting the first cell of row by value 2

comments.author: lluiscab
comments.body: Hi, I'm facing exactly the same issue here, did you ever find a solution?
